channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Global Investment Shifts Amid the 2025–2026 Middle East Conflict
item.description: The 2025–2026 period, particularly during the Israel-US-Iran conflict, has shown significant shifts in global investment patterns, highlighting the close link between geopolitics and capital flows. No...

item.title: Tanzania VP Calls for Professionalism and Integrity Among Personal Secretaries
item.description: Tanzania’s Vice-President Emmanuel Nchimbi has urged personal secretaries across the country to maintain high professionalism and discipline, highlighting their role as the first point of contact in b...

item.title: PMD warns of intense heatwave across Sindh ahead of Eid ul Adha
item.description: According to the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD), Sindh is likely to face a severe heatwave from 25th to 31st May, with temperatures rising 4-6°C above normal levels. Cities like Sukkur, Shik...

item.title: Community unrest at Ebola hospital in DR Congo after disputed death
item.description: For real, wah! Things got serious at Rwampara General Hospital in Bunia, Ituri province, eastern DR Congo, where people started acting wild after they were stopped from taking the body of a young man ...

item.title: Matatu operators cancel strike after government talks
item.description: Transport sector stakeholders in Kenya have decided to call off the planned matatu strike following constructive discussions with government representatives, including President Ruto. Most of the oper...

item.title: Tanzania appoints new ambassadors to strengthen international ties
item.description: Tanzania imesheheni kuchukua hatua kubwa ya kidiplomasia, kwa kutuma mabalozi wapya katika maeneo muhimu duniani ikiwa ni pamoja na Mashariki ya Kati, Afrika, Ulaya, na Umoja wa Mataifa. Mabalozi wapy...

item.title: A Retrospective Look at David Lynch's Early Years and Artistic Development
item.description: David Keith Lynch (January 20, 1946 – January 16, 2025) was a seminal American filmmaker, actor, painter, and musician, recognized as one of the most influential figures in cinema. Known for his disti...

item.title: Kenya's Public Transport Strike Called Off After State House Negotiations
item.description: Nairobi — The Federation of Public Transport Sector (FPTS), including the Matatu Owners Association, has officially ended the nationwide fuel strike following a high-level meeting with President Willi...

item.title: Douglas Perrett’s Polaroids Capture Supermodels Before Fame
item.description: Douglas Perrett, a prominent New York casting director and founder of COACD, has documented the early careers of some of the world’s most iconic supermodels. His limited-edition book, Wild Things, rel...

item.title: NASCAR Champion Kyle Busch Dies at Age 41
item.description: Kyle Busch, a two-time NASCAR Cup Series champion, has passed away at the age of 41. Busch was widely celebrated in the racing community for his accomplishments on the track, including multiple victor...

item.title: CBI Corrects Mistaken Arrest in West Bengal CM Suvendu Aide Murder Investigation
item.description: In a significant development in the murder case of Chandranath Rath, personal assistant to West Bengal Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari, the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) discovered that Raj Si...

item.title: Kurt Browning reflects on his first summer job and its lessons
item.description: Before becoming a world-renowned Olympic figure skater, Kurt Browning spent a summer working at Chi-Chi’s, a Mexican restaurant in Edmonton. At 16, he had been training intensively in figure skating w...

item.title: Uasin Gishu Confirms No Ebola Case After Suspected Patient Tests Negative
item.description: Residents of Uasin Gishu can relax a bit after county health officials confirmed that a suspected Ebola case in Eldoret tested negative. The patient, a 29-year-old truck driver, had recently travelled...

item.title: West Bengal Police Registers FIR Against Two Actors Over Social Media Remarks After 2021 Poll Violence
item.description: The West Bengal Police have registered a first information report (FIR) against actors Parambrata Chattopadhyay and Swastika Mukherjee for allegedly making provocative remarks on social media during t...

item.title: Katherine Cassidy and the Iconic Fashion of the 1940s and 1950s
item.description: Katherine Cassidy was a prominent fashion model during the 1940s and 1950s, widely admired for her refined elegance and ability to exemplify the era's sophisticated style. She frequently collaborated ...

item.title: House Republicans’ Absences Could Lead to Trump Losing Key War Powers Vote
item.description: House Republicans are facing serious attendance issues that could jeopardize President Donald Trump’s legislative agenda. A recent report highlighted that some GOP members have been absent for extende...

item.title: Officials who aided Bato dela Rosa may be barred from public office, says Carpio
item.description: Former Supreme Court senior associate justice Antonio Carpio clarified that government officials found guilty of helping Senator Ronald 'Bato' Dela Rosa escape from the Senate after the May 13 shootin...

item.title: BTS Announces Philippine Stop for ‘Arirang’ World Tour in 2027
item.description: K-pop global sensation BTS has officially announced that they will include the Philippines in their upcoming 'Arirang' world tour. The concert is scheduled to take place in March 2027 at the Philippin...

item.title: Tanzania and international partners join forces to improve cassava farming
item.description: The Tanzania Agricultural Research Institute (TARI) recently hosted a delegation from Cornell University and the International Institute of Tropical Agriculture (IITA) at its Dodoma headquarters, show...

item.title: Using Pink Noise to Enhance Anesthesia by Modulating Delta Brain Waves
item.description: Researchers at the University of Montreal are exploring how auditory stimulation using pink noise can enhance the effectiveness of general anesthesia. Building on sleep research showing that delta wav...
